name: insertLocalImage
description: Uploads a local image file to Google Drive and inserts it into a Google Document. The image will be uploaded to the same folder as the document (or optionally to a specified folder).

documentId.description: The ID of the Google Document (from the URL).

localImagePath.description: Absolute path to the local image file (supports .jpg, .jpeg, .png, .gif, .bmp, .webp, .svg).

index.description: The index (1-based) where the image should be inserted in the document.

width.description: Optional: Width of the image in points.

height.description: Optional: Height of the image in points.

uploadToSameFolder.description: If true, uploads the image to the same folder as the document. If false, uploads to Drive root.
